questions.question: This Academy Award winning actress was born in Stockholm and had a long and varied career, most famously Casablanca and Anastasia.
Though introduced in the early 1900s, this Planter's icon made his television debut in the 1950s.
What country music icon popularized the honky tonk style of country music in the 1950s, characterized by one of his hits, 'Hey Good Lookin''?
What communist-hunter was censured by his fellow senators in 1954?
